EventEntry.description: One entry in the activity feed: a fault, safety-interlock activation, profile application, setpoint edit, or drift detection (frontend data model §4). Severity is the platform's dashboard grading (info/warning/critical) — distinct from the controller's fault severity (warning/alarm).

ts.description: When the event occurred (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

kind.description: Closed set of event kinds surfaced to the operator. `optimizer_plan_applied` (3) is an applied optimizer plan — a setpoint write stamped `source: optimizer` (RFC-005); held-cycle escalations are not events (they live in the polled optimizer console queue).

severity.description: info = informational; warning = degraded but operating; critical = raises a toast.

source.description: Who or what produced the event (audit attribution, platform §6) — e.g. operator, crop_profile, optimizer.
